name: Budibase
description: The low code platform you'll enjoy using
compose:
name: slashnode-budibase
services:
  budibase:
    image: budibase/budibase:3.39.22
    container_name: budibase
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      JWT_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - budibase_data-budibase:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:6733:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  budibase_data-budibase:
    name: slashnode-budibase_budibase_data-budibase
